Osceola County FHA Loans

FHA loans in Osceola County, Florida

FHA loans across Osceola County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, why this Orlando-area county is so FHA-friendly, and how to get pre-approved.

Osceola County Home Loans

FHA loans in Osceola County, Florida

Osceola County offers an affordable gateway to the Orlando metro, anchored by Kissimmee and St. Cloud and fueled by the region's tourism economy. With abundant new construction and a diverse, fast-growing population, it's one of Central Florida's most accessible FHA markets — the loan limit covers most homes, and 3.5% down opens the door for first-time buyers and families relocating to the area.

Osceola County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Osceola County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Osceola County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Osceola's affordable, fast-growing market, that covers the vast majority of homes, including extensive new construction. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Osceola County's exact figure with HUD.

Affordable Orlando-area growth in Osceola

Osceola lets buyers tap the Orlando job market at a lower price point, with lots of new construction that meets FHA standards — ideal for first-time buyers. Communities range from established Kissimmee and St. Cloud to master-planned Poinciana. Pair FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds, and get pre-approved first so your offer stands out in a competitive metro.

Communities We Serve

FHA loans across Osceola County

We help FHA buyers throughout Osceola County, including Kissimmee, St. Cloud, Poinciana, and Celebration. For a closer look at the local market, loan limits, and down payment help, explore our city guide(s):

Kissimmee

Down payment help in Osceola County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Osceola County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Osceola County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Osceola County for 2026?+
Osceola County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers nearly all homes in the county. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Osceola County good for FHA buyers?+
Yes — it's an affordable, new-construction-rich gateway to Orlando, making it one of Central Florida's friendliest FHA markets.
Does FHA work for new-construction homes in Osceola County?+
Yes — newer homes typically pass the FHA appraisal easily and sit within the loan limit.
How much down payment do I need in Osceola County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Osceola County?+
Yes — Kissimmee, St. Cloud, Poinciana, Celebration, and every community in the county.
